title: Bedrock Splitter
description: A new way to break bedrock!
body:
This pack adds a new enchantment, Bedrock Splitter, which allows you to break bedrock in a much more survival-friendly way!

Bedrock Splitter is a very late-game enchantment, only being compatible with Netherite Pickaxes and only being found in Ancient City loot. It can be used by hitting a piece of Bedrock with your enchanted pickaxe, which will take about 1/3 of the durability (or much less with Unbreaking 3), and break the bedrock down into obsidian.
